property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.1\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\maven\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python38\Scripts\;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python38\;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\K Aditya\Downloads\mingw-18.0-without-git.exe;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.2\bin;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Python\bin;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Add product to cart from Toys category", "Amazon Add to Cart Functionality"](1)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //span[text()='Fotball'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 146.0.3856.97, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 2156, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:56881}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 146.0.3856.84 (fe100ed2d0fb..., userDataDir: C:\Users\KADITY~1\AppData\L...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:56881/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.3856.97, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 507dd0ca0fa7da5d1c08d8445ace84b3

Scenario: Add product to cart from Toys category # src/test/resources/features/add_to_cart.feature:3 16:22:01 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST STARTED: Add product to cart from Toys category ========== Launching browser: edge 16:22:05 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser launched and URL opened 16:22:05 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Amazon homepage opened Given user is on Amazon homepage # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.openAmazon() 16:22:05 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Navigating to Toys category When user navigates to Toys category from menu # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.navigateMenu() 16:22:11 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Selecting product And user selects a product from category page # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.selectProduct() org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //span[text()='Fotball'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 146.0.3856.97, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 2156, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:56881}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 146.0.3856.84 (fe100ed2d0fb..., userDataDir: C:\Users\KADITY~1\AppData\L...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:56881/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.3856.97, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 507dd0ca0fa7da5d1c08d8445ace84b3 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at pages.CategoryPage.navigateToFootball(CategoryPage.java:23) at stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.selectProduct(AmazonCartSteps.java:33) at ✽.user selects a product from category page(file:///C:/Users/K%20Aditya/IdeaProjects/WalmartUiAutomation/src/test/resources/features/add_to_cart.feature:7)
And user switches to product tab # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.switchTab() Then product page should be displayed # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.validateProductPage() When user adds product to cart # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.addCart() And user navigates to cart page # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.openCart() Then product should be added to cart # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.validateProductAdded() And subtotal should be displayed # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.validateSubtotal() And cart count should be updated # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.validateCartCount() 16:22:28 ERROR hooks.Hooks - TEST FAILED: Add product to cart from Toys category
Embedding Add product to cart from Toys category [image/png 363995 bytes]
16:22:29 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser closed 16:22:29 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST ENDED ==========

Apr 02, 2026 4:22:03 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 02, 2026 4:22:03 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.3856.97. testcase.name: runScenario["Search for iPhone using search bar", "Amazon Search Functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search for iPhone using search bar # src/test/resources/features/search.feature:3 16:22:30 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST STARTED: Search for iPhone using search bar ========== Launching browser: edge 16:22:32 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser launched and URL opened 16:22:32 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Amazon homepage opened Given user opens Amazon homepage # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.openAmazon() 16:22:32 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Entering product: iPhone When user enters "iPhone" in search bar # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.enterSearch(java.lang.String) 16:22:36 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Clicking first suggestion And user clicks on first suggestion # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.clickFirstSuggestion() 16:22:39 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Validating results page Then results page should be displayed # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.verifyResultsPage() 16:22:39 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Validating results for: iPhone And results should be relevant to "iPhone" # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.validateResults(java.lang.String) 16:22:39 INFO hooks.Hooks - TEST PASSED: Search for iPhone using search bar 16:22:40 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser closed 16:22:40 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST ENDED ==========
testcase.system-err: Apr 02, 2026 4:22:31 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 02, 2026 4:22:31 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.3856.97. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.21.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
